case.description: Packaged bank reconciliation placeholder with an embedded CSV-like file payload and deterministic reconciliation anchors for future runtime activation.

response_json.detail: Unsupported file MIME type for bank_reconciliation_file_placeholder.csv: 'text/csv'. Supported types: application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp.

contract.response_text: {"detail":"Unsupported file MIME type for bank_reconciliation_file_placeholder.csv: 'text/csv'. Supported types: application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp."}
errors: Solve endpoint did not return application/json.
Solve endpoint response body was not exactly {'status': 'completed'}.

disqualification_reasons: Solve response was not HTTP 200 with {"status": "completed"} (got HTTP 422).
Solution did not route traffic through the recording proxy.
